title: CPvP Utilities
description: CPvP Utilities is a Fabric Client-side mod designed to enhance the Crystal PvP experience, providing a set of utilities that streamline and simplify common combat interactions, all configurable through an in-game ClickGUI.
body:
# S4nnT1 Utilities

S4nnT1 Utilities is a Fabric client-side mod designed for Minecraft 1.21.1 and 1.21.4, built to enhance and simplify the Crystal PvP experience. Whether you're a seasoned fighter or just getting into the playstyle, this mod provides a set of carefully crafted utilities that streamline the most common and demanding interactions in Crystal PvP combat.


All modules are managed through a clean, lightweight in-game ClickGUI, accessible at any time without pausing the game. Each module can be toggled on or off independently, and many include configurable settings such as sliders and toggles, allowing you to fine-tune the behavior to match your playstyle and server requirements.

The mod is fully client-side, meaning no server-side installation is required. It is built on the Fabric mod loader and is designed to be lightweight, with minimal performance impact even during intense combat situations.

**Requires:** Fabric Loader 0.18.4+ and Fabric API for Minecraft 1.21.4



It has a total of 5 modules:
• AutoCrystal
• AutoSprint
• FullBright
• CrystalSetUp
• AnchorHotkey
